mapper.select: SELECT main.INVM_HNF_NM , main.TPN , main.EAD , main.INVM_HNF_INFO_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_CNVRS_HNF_INFO_R main WHERE 1=1 AND main.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT main.UTLINSTT_ID , main.RGSN_TS , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , CASE WHEN eim.BZN IS NULL THEN '' ELSE REGEXP_REPLACE(eim.BZN, '^([0-9]{3})-?([0-9]{2})-?([0-9]{5})$', '\1-\2-\3') END AS BZN
, first_dt.FIRST_ACCEPT_DATE , CASE WHEN first_dt.FIRST_ACCEPT_DATE IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE last_dt.LAST_CONVERT_DATE END AS LAST_CONVERT_DATE
, CASE WHEN main.USE_YN IS NULL THEN '투자희망기업' WHEN main.USE_YN = 'Y' THEN '투자사' ELSE '투자희망기업' END AS USIS_STATE , main.USE_YN FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L main LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID, MIN(AMNN_TS) AS FIRST_ACCEPT_DATE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_H WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) first_dt ON first_dt.UTLINSTT_ID = main.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID, MAX(AMNN_TS) AS LAST_CONVERT_DATE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_H GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID ) last_dt ON last_dt.UTLINSTT_ID = main.UTLINSTT_ID INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON main.UTLINSTT_ID = eim.UTLINSTT_ID WHERE 1=1 AND eim.ACVT_YN = 'Y'
AND eim.ETNM LIKE '%'||#{bplcNm}||'%'
AND main.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
ORDER BY main.RGSN_TS DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT icl.UTLINSTT_ID , icl.CNVS_RQST_SQN -- , icl.CNVS_RQST_STTS_CD_ID , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS CNVS_RQST_STTS_CD_NM , icl.RGSN_USER_ID , icl.RGSN_TS , icl.AMNN_USER_ID , icl.AMNN_TS , ivm.INVM_CNVS_STTS as CNVS_RQST_STTS_CD_ID , CASE WHEN ALRT_CNFA_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE ALRT_CNFA_YN END AS ALRT_CNFA_YN
, BRGC_FILE_ID , RGSN_USER_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_CNVRS_RQST_INFO_M ivm LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_CNVS_L icl ON ivm.UTLINSTT_ID = icl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = icl.CNVS_RQST_STTS_CD_ID WHERE ivm.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY icl.CNVS_RQST_SQN DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT main.* , eim.BZN , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L main INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON main.UTLINSTT_ID = eim.UTLINSTT_ID WHERE main.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L ( UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT , USE_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) VALUES ( #{utlinsttId} , #{invmCmpPtrnCd} , 12 , 'N' , #{rgsnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , #{amnnUserId} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT base.* , (SELECT COUNT(*) from IVBADM.TB_BOX_IVT_AGREM_VNENTR_INVT_MANAGE_M SUB WHERE base.BZN = SUB.BZN) AS AGRN_VNCN_YN FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_CNVRS_RQST_INFO_M base WHERE base.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT m1.INVT_ID , m1.RPT_DSNC , m1.FILE_ID , m2.FILE_NM , m1.LADA , m1.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ORRP_M m1 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M m2 on m1.FILE_ID = m2.FILE_ID WHERE INVT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(MDPH_SQN), 0) + 1 AS mdphSqn FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_H WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_H ( UTLINSTT_ID , MDPH_SQN , INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT , USE_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS ) SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , #{mdphSqn} , INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT , USE_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

INSERT INTO TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R ( INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS ) SELECT tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID AS INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , #{AUDIT_EXPIRED} AS INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , #{rgsnUserId} AS RGSN_USER_ID , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_RQST_M tbiar INNER JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID , INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID ORDER BY RGSN_TS DESC) AS RNK , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_EXNT_PGSG_R ) WHERE RNK = 1 ) epr ON (tbiar.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID = epr.INVM_EXNT_RQST_ID) WHERE 1=1 AND (tbiar.INVM_CMP_ID = #{utlinsttId} OR tbiar.RQST_ENPR_ID = #{utlinsttId}) AND epr.INVM_EXNT_PGSG_CD IN (#{AUDIT_SUGGEST}, #{AUDIT_REQUEST}, #{AUDIT_EVALUATE})
